title: YTPMV - Sarcastic Megaconvulsion
description:
This is probably the shortest YTPMV ever made. I used the song "Sarcastic Megaconvulsion" of an extremly obscure noisecore band called "Satanic Death". The song was on a split with the noiseband Audiostench. The song is only a few frames long.

Link to the song: http://extremenoise.narod.ru/mp3/satanicdeath-track10.mp3
